title: pyrethrum tomentosum
intro: Pyrethrum tomentosum, also known as the pyrethrum daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant contains pyrethrins, a group of natural insecticides that have been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum tomentosum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties, which provide several health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum tomentosum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
